title: Stick a top level signal from command line argument
body:
I am using verilator as part of the rocket chip repo and had a question. 

__Background__
I am generating the repository as a sub-component of a larger verilog project and have some control signals coming out of the top level module (top level from the verilator perspective). Currently these signals are not driven by the TestHarness so are randomly initialized. The problem is that some combinations of tests and inputs create failures. 

__Question__
Is there a way that I can pass an argument from command line to assign the value of a top level verilog IO signal?
